pages.text: Amplifier Ore — the counterpart of energium, generated in ocean biomes. It lacks direct magical properties but serves as the foundation for creating unique items.

pages.title: Amplifier Ore
pages.text: Generates between heights 16 and 80 in oceans.$(br2)Mining drops $(l)Amplifier Drop$(), used for crafting. Processed ore emits light (level 6).

pages.title: Amplifier Drop
pages.text: Key component for:$(br)- Star Regeneration Potion$(br)- Amplifier Ring

pages.title: Star Regeneration Potion
pages.text: Effect: Doubles star points recovery speed per level.$(br2)Ingredients:$(br)Amplifier Drop + Awkward Potion

pages.title: Amplifier Ring
pages.text: Resets the recharge of elemental stones. To do this, put a ring in the main hand and a stone in the spare hand and press the right mouse button.
